response.content:
Here's a generic Verilog module:

```verilog
module custom_module(
    input        clk,
    input        reset,
    input  [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) data_out <= 8'b0;
        else       data_out <= data_in;
    end
endmodule
```
